concerns: Plan step 5 calls collectSnapshot() inside the module. The existing permission-debt module follows the same pattern (calling collectSnapshot/checkPermissions directly), so this is consistent — but consider whether main.ts should collect the snapshot once and pass it to both modules to avoid redundant collection. Not a blocker, but worth noting.
The plan references createOsintCardList() which already exists in src/ui/osint-card.ts with the exact OsintCardData interface the plan describes — good alignment, no issues there.

Region inference helper should handle the MISSING sentinels ('unknown'/'unavailable') from src/signals/snapshot.ts gracefully — the plan mentions this in risks but the step 4 description should explicitly note returning a fallback when timezone is a sentinel value.
Minor: the plan says '~7-8 findings' — pin this to a specific count so tests can assert deterministically. The 8 findings listed in step 1 are well-defined, so commit to 8.
